================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 8F A7 60 DA 7F
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1875
Reflected CC   : 0x1A
RetType        : 0x05
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 124

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================

ReflectedCC  : 0x1A
PayloadLen   : 124

[EPS P60 ACU GET TABLE HK]

[Inputs]
c_in[0..5]: 502 506 528 529 520 531

vbat: 16316

temp[0..2]: 195 194 195

vboost[0..5]: 2741 2768 2768 2768 2768 2741
power[0..5]: 1323 1342 1408 1408 1391 1415

dac_en[0..2]: 1 1 1

bootcause : 3054841720
bootcnt   : 1
uptime    : 146
resetcause: 0x4660

[MPPT Timing]
mppt_time  : 43
mppt_period: 1

[Device]
device_type[0..7]: 22 0 49 0 0 0 7 1
device_status[0..7]: 1 3 3 3 4 0 1 1

[WDT]
wdt_cnt_gnd : 65793
